title: Random Block Area
description: Dynamically replaces blocks around the player in real time with customizable radius, shape options, whitelists, and built-in protection for critical blocks.
body:
# 🎲 Random Block Area - Transform Your World Dynamically!

**Random Block Area** replaces blocks around players in real-time, creating a chaotic, ever-changing environment. Perfect for challenge maps, survival modes, or just messing around!  

> ⚠️ **Early version:** The mod is still in development and will receive updates, new features, and improvements regularly.

## ✨ Features

- **Dynamic Block Replacement:** Blocks around you are replaced automatically as you move.
- **Customizable Radius:** Set the replacement area from 1 to 32 blocks.
- **Shape Modes:** Choose between circular (sphere) or square (cube) zones.
- **Performance Control:** Adjust blocks replaced per tick (1-50) for speed vs stability.
- **Whitelist System:** Pick which blocks are used for replacement from 600+ solid blocks.
- **Block Protection:**
  - Protect Bedrock 
  - Protect Chests  
  - Protect Water  
  - Protect Lava 
- **Automatic Filtering:** Skips non-solid blocks like fences, slabs, stairs, signs, carpets.
- 🎛️ **In-Game Configuration:** Easy menu with search for block selection.
- 🌐 **Multiplayer Friendly:** Works on client & dedicated servers.

## 🎮 Use Cases

-  **Survival Challenge:** Navigate ever-changing terrain.  
-  **Building Practice:** Adapt to random materials.  
-  **Exploration Mode:** Discover unique block combinations.  
-  **Chaos Mode:** Maximum unpredictability with all blocks enabled.

## ⚙️ Configuration

Control everything from the mod menu: radius, chaos level, block selection, protections, and more!  

---

Stay tuned for updates! 🚀 New features, options, and optimizations are coming soon!
